subject:
This is the first video, no filters, no polish, just the raw reality of building in public.

My core bet is simple. Six

design_system.texture_atmosphere: <A subtle texture with a slight grain to maintain the academic and technical feel. Blurring can be used for depth and layering, but sparingly to keep focus on key elements>

scene_treatments.hook: <A clean animated infographic of Nervix's infrastructure with 19 adapters fading in one by one, accompanied by a smooth transition from background to Tech Blue highlight.>
scene_treatments.thesis: <A text overlay 'The challenge is monetization sequencing' appears with increasing opacity and scale, followed by an academic chart displaying the multi-agent fleet dispatch system in action>
scene_treatments.evidence_1: <Demonstration of each project (DansLab, ZmartyChat, Crawdbot, MyWork) with a gradual reveal from off-screen using transform property. Each is highlighted briefly before fading out to keep focus on the overall ecosystem build-up>
scene_treatments.evidence_2: <A detailed visual representation of monetization tiers, free, subscription, and pay-per-use models appearing one by one with fadeIn and fadeOut animations to maintain clarity and coherence.>
scene_treatments.implication: <An animated overlay appears over key areas showing interconnectedness and value creation within the ecosystem using scale and rotate properties for emphasis. The text 'This is the structural solution that makes the entire fleet viable' fades in with a smooth transition from background color>
scene_treatments.cta: <A bright yellow gold button labeled 'Join the Fleet' appears on screen, growing in size with a slight hover effect and scale animation to draw attention>

asset_checklist: Illustrations of Nervix infrastructure and projects
